title: Eggs in Confit with Silky Flaxseed Topping
description: A twist on traditional eggs with a silky flaxseed and confit topping, perfect for a sick day breakfast.
instructions: Crack eggs into a bowl and whisk them together. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Heat the confit in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Pour the eggs into the skillet and cook until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
While the eggs are baking, mix the ground flaxseed with a little water to create a silky paste.
Remove the skillet from the oven and top the eggs with the silky flaxseed paste.
Garnish with a sprinkle of sick, if desired.
